name: pi-autoresearch-skill
description: Autonomous experiment loop for Claude Code. Port of davebcn87/pi-autoresearch — try an idea, measure it, keep what works, discard what doesn't, repeat.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous experiment loop skill. Iteratively optimizes a measurable metric (test speed, build time, bundle size, cdk synth time, training loss, anything benchmarkable) by hypothesizing, benchmarking, and keeping only improvements.
